title: Blerd
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Blerd''' were a domesticated animal that the [[Newcomer]]s used on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. Blerds produced [[Milk/Legends|milk]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|''Planet of Twilight'' abridged audiobook]]
